journal_entry.description: Office relocation services provided to customer, payment due in 10 days
journal_entry.rationale: Revenue is recognized when services are provided. Accounts receivable increases (asset) as payment is due in 10 days. HST at 13% is collected on taxable services in Ontario and recorded as HST Payable (liability).

output_debit_classifier.reason: Service revenue earned on credit with HST collected. Accounts receivable increases (asset), service revenue increases, HST payable increases (liability). HST = $31,500 × 13% = $4,095. Total debit $35,595 = total credits ($31,500 + $4,095).

output_credit_classifier.reason: Service revenue earned on credit with HST collected. Accounts receivable increases (asset), service revenue increases, HST payable increases (liability). HST = $31,500 × 13% = $4,095. Total debit $35,595 = total credits ($31,500 + $4,095).
